prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Identify the key types/functions at each hop in this HTTP call chain: 1. In `grafana/grafana`: What is the type/struct that acts as the HTTP client for Loki queries? 2. In `sg-evals/grafana-loki`: What is the function that parses incoming HTTP instant query requests?
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Identify the key types/functions at each hop in this HTTP call chain: 1. In `grafana/grafana`: What is the type/struct that acts as the HTTP client for Loki queries? 2. In `sg-evals/grafana-loki`: What is the function that parses incoming HTTP instant query requests?
